```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(Seurat)
library(patchwork)
library(reticulate)
# read in data
emtab.data <- Read10X(data.dir = "/w5home/bmoore/scRNAseq/LiFangChu/public_data/E_MTAB_11334/output_20251204_225619/alignment_No_Matrigel_CHIR99021_8-10_lane2/raw/")
# make seurat object
seurat.obj <- CreateSeuratObject(
    counts = emtab.data,
    project = "emtab",
    min.cells = 3,
    min.features = 200
)
seurat.obj
```

```{r}
sox2.data <- FetchData(object = seurat.obj, vars = "SOX2", layer = "counts")
head(sox2.data)
```
```{r}
sum(sox2.data$SOX2)
```
